name: akeneo
description: Reads Akeneo PIM products, categories, families, attributes, and channels through the Akeneo REST API (OAuth2 password grant).

risk.read: external Akeneo PIM API read of product, category, family, attribute, and channel data
risk.approval: none; read-only, no obviously-safe reverse-ETL write surface

conformance.reason: custom-auth-only (mode:custom AuthHook, no when-gated non-custom fallback); hook-covered, proven live by internal/connectors/paritytest/akeneo (the AuthHook's real OAuth2 password-grant path) -- conformance's synthetic config has no real token_url/api_username/password and cannot exercise mode:custom auth at all, so every auth-resolving dynamic check would otherwise fail identically and uninformatively
